note: Kernel-level SEMANTIC baseline (issue #6). The sibling expected-error.json is the SCHEMA-level (ajv) baseline and is intentionally left unchanged; the kernel independently catches this via redundancy validation.

errors.message: Entry 'server-leafs' uses MCLAG with switch_count 3; MCLAG requires an even switch_count of at least 2 (DOMAIN_MODEL.md FabricDomain invariants).
